generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a dad and taxpayer, I support civil defense preparedness because it's about protecting our families without breaking the bank. My local community's emergency drills showed how simple planning can make a real difference. Why shouldn't we expect the same level of care from our national leaders? #CommonSenseSecurity #ProtectOurFamilies
